Compatible with a wide range of Dolce Gusto machines

products.name: Nespresso
pros: Highest-rated in Altroconsumo's capsule test for aroma and crema

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo's 2025 capsule test recommends Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as top choices based on flavor, compatibility, and price. The evidence is from March 2025, older than 60 days.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
